Metadata.title: PoGoSundet
Metadata.description: Find your local Pokémon GO community in Frederikssund

Home.title: PoGoSundet
Home.subtitle: Find your local community, coordinate raids and catch together.
Home.sliceNotice: Profile creation is the next step — coming soon.

Login.title: PoGoSundet
Login.subtitle: Log in to find your local community.
Login.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Register.title: PoGoSundet
Register.subtitle: Create an account and find your local community.
Register.consentRequired: You must accept the privacy policy to create an account.
Register.googleConsentNotice: By clicking you accept the privacy policy.
Register.successMessage: Check your email to confirm your account.
Register.errorEmailTaken: An account with this email already exists.
Register.errorWeakPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters.
Register.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Reset.title: Forgot password?
Reset.subtitle: Enter your email and we will send you a link to reset your password.
Reset.successMessage: Check your email for a link to reset your password.
Reset.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

ResetConfirm.title: New password
ResetConfirm.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
ResetConfirm.errorWeakPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters.
ResetConfirm.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.stub: This page is a placeholder. The full privacy policy will be published before launch.

ProfileSetup.subtitle: Create your local trainer profile
ProfileSetup.cardSubtitle: Share only what you want other local players to see. Your trainer name and friend code help others connect with you quickly.
ProfileSetup.photoSubtitle: You can continue without a photo and add one later from your profile.
ProfileSetup.bioPlaceholder: Tell us a bit about yourself and where you play...
ProfileSetup.errorTrainerNameLength: Trainer name must be 3–24 characters with no leading/trailing spaces
ProfileSetup.errorFirstNameLength: First name must be 50 characters or fewer
ProfileSetup.errorBioLength: Bio must be 280 characters or fewer
ProfileSetup.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
